understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the scenario is to get any pushable object, such as the selected piece or a block, to reach or exceed the target x-coordinate specified in the level, while efficiently managing a limited step budget to avoid failure.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece by one step (3 pixels) in the chosen direction; if a pushable object is adjacent, it may be pushed along with the piece. Walls can block movement, with potential differences in behavior for direct movement versus pushing objects against them, and the SELECT action allows switching control to another object by specifying its ID.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | The selected piece is adjacent to the pushable block on the right, so moving right will attempt to push the block toward the target x of 6.
history.reasoning: The selected piece is adjacent to the pushable block on the right, so moving right will attempt to push the block toward the target x of 6.
